#1 Instagram-first social media scheduler
Create, source, share and cross-post your best Instagram content to Facebook, Twitter, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, LinkedIn, Google Business Profile and more – with only a few clicks.
Start a trial Book a demo
Prior to Sked Social we didn’t have an Instagram strategy, we probably had 60 followers and hardly ever posted. We currently have 51,000 and are growing consistently and our Instagram accounts count as one of our stronger brand assets.
Femi Omoluabi, Azarai
Schedule everything, everywhere
What makes us different? Instagram is our focus — not a feature
Reels Insights
See how your Reels are performing in one dashboard
Link Sticker Auto-Scheduling
Put Stickers and send them to schedule automatically!
Social Inbox
Answer your Facebook and Instagram messages from the one platform
Tags and Hashtags
Schedule Instagram posts with product tags, hashtags, user tags, and location tags for more engagement and sales.
Automatically Publish Posts
With Sked Social, “auto-posting” actually means auto-posting — no more notifications to post at 6:42 PM on a Saturday.
Visually Plan Your Feed
See what your Instagram feed will look like weeks and months before you post, then drag and drop to make it perfect.
Link in Bio tool
Get a customizable link in bio page that directs followers exactly where you want them to go.
Auto-Post Across Platforms
Instagram-first doesn’t mean Instagram-only. Auto-post to Facebook, Twitter, Google My Business and LinkedIn just as easily.
Social Media Analytics
Sked doesn’t limit how far in advance you can schedule or the number of posts. Our Instagram & Facebook analytics go back up to 2 years.
Sked Social has helped us streamline our entire Instagram social media process. No other social media scheduling platform allows us to do this and we’ve tried them all. Can’t do without.
It has helped us increase revenue and engagement all whilst working on auto pilot. It’s like an employee for just a few $$ a month!
James Breese
Strength Matters
Start your 7 day free trial
Visually plan an attractive and cohesive Instagram feed
The Planner is a perfect feature to help create consistency in how we want our IG feed to look, along with the simplicity to edit and move images, instantly providing the exact overall look we are after.

Essendon Field
I love using the planner to see how my images will look before they’re posted. It helps me avoid making an image live, and then realizing it looks like garbage. Thanks for helping me avoid a garbage aesthetic!
Jillian Richardson
The Joy List
Being able to plan how the feed design works by seeing it all laid out has been immensely helpful and so far as I know, you are the only platform that offers this amazing visual planning ability.

EmpoweredOne
Stop logging in on evenings and weekends to post
I love the auto posting feature!! I can schedule weeks in advance, and not have to worry about being free to post myself on nights and weekends.
Ashley Ballard
gDiapers
Our social media team is able to “set it and forget it” which means on weekends, they have the freedom to go about their days without worrying about posting. This has resulted in no missed/overlooked post as well as posts getting out on time per our plan.

Azuñia Tequila
Time needed to publish content for our clients has decreased by at least 15%. We’re able to use IG Stories in our strategy efforts more because we have the ability to schedule.

Recreation Dallas
Grow your following and sales with tags
In a world where Instagram Shopping is going to become very important in a short period of time, a major win is being able to schedule and automatically publish posts with product tags in place.

Bixler
Our favourite feature is being able to schedule the shopping tag, this has directed customers straight to our website and in many cases has resulted in an instant purchase.

We LOVE the first comment feature for using our hashtags! Paired with the post templates it’s so easy to make sure we always have the best hashtags on our posts.

Start your free 7-day trial Explore Sked's features
Autopost to Facebook, Twitter, Linkedin and Google My Business
Instagram-first doesn’t mean Instagram-only. Repurpose or create fresh content, then schedule your content to auto-post on Facebook, LinkedIn, Google My Business and Twitter.
I love being able to post simultaneously to Facebook and Instagram but with tailored captions on each — these kinds of details make all the difference. Close quotation mark
Annabel Henderson Morrell
Hamilton Gardens
Get deep Instagram analytics you can actually act on
Find the best time to post, analyze your Instagram Story performance, compare your activity against competitors and more — all without a Data Science PhD.
As Instagram has evolved, not all scheduling platforms have kept up. Sked Social has allowed us to stay current with our customer's needs, and now, to also explore usage data via their new Analytics feature (and it's all about meaningful data).
Victor Machado
Post&Wall Digital Marketing Agency
Work from anywhere and from any device
Create and upload content from your desktop, then check to see how your posts are performing, make tweaks, and add new content on the fly with the mobile app.
It's almost effortless to do collections and stories from my desktop. No other tool comes close.
Elaine Vydra
St. Louis Post-Dispatch
Collaborate with UNLIMITED users for FREE
Whether you’re collaborating with your team and freelancers on multiple accounts, or managing internal and external approval steps — loop in as many people as you want for free on our 'essentials' plan and above.
Sked Social has helped me manage my clients Instagram accounts much more effectively. I can now schedule weeks of posts in advance, my clients can view the schedule and approve/make changes as required. I'm no longer chained to the screen posting like a crazy.
Elesha Piper
Joy Digital
